purpose: A single selection within a group of mutually exclusive options. Used when 2–6 options are visible and user must choose one.
whenToUse: 2–6 mutually exclusive options where all should be visible
When the user must see all options to decide
whenNotToUse: For single binary choices — use Switch or CheckBox
doRules: Always have one option selected by default when possible
Label the group with a header above
dontRules: Do not use RadioButton outside a group
Do not use with more than 6 options — use Select
Do not allow no-selection if a choice is required

layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px between circle and label; 8px between options.
layoutGuidance.alignment: Vertical stack by default; horizontal for ≤3 options.

responsiveBehavior.S: Vertical stack with full-width touch areas

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Arrow keys move selection within group; Tab skips to next group
Group has accessible name; each option has label
Visible focus on selected radio in group
Selected state announced as "radio button, selected"

exceptions: Use RadioButtonGroup component to enforce groupName binding
